title: ficus subrigida
intro: Ficus subrigida, also known as the small-leafed fig, is a type of plant species in the family Moraceae. The leaves and roots of the Ficus subrigida plant are used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of the Ficus subrigida plant include its ability to help manage fever, reduce inflammation, and treat various skin conditions. Ficus subrigida is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and can be consumed as a supplement to support overall health and well-being.
